label: Report excerpt (as extracted text)
content:
ACME Corporation — 2025 Annual Report (excerpt)

Letter to Shareholders

Fiscal 2025 was a year of disciplined growth. Revenue rose 18% to $412M, driven by expansion in our cloud segment, while operating margin improved to 21%. We returned $60M to shareholders through buybacks and continued to invest in R&D, which now represents 14% of revenue.

Looking ahead, we expect continued momentum in cloud, tempered by macroeconomic uncertainty in our hardware business.
